footer.aboutTextFallback: Wuhan Yousen Classroom Art Training School Co., Ltd., specializing in preschool-primary transition education for 8 years, with 6 campuses across Wuhan.

chat.welcome: Hello! I'm the Yousen AI assistant. How can I help you?
chat.transferPrompt: Sure, transferring you to a human agent. Please wait...
chat.thresholdPrompt: You've asked many questions today. To serve you better, we suggest booking a free trial class. Our consultant will assist you in detail.
chat.guidancePrompt: I need to transfer this question to a human agent. You can also leave your contact information and our consultant will reach out soon.
chat.fallbackAnswer: Sorry, I cannot answer this question. Would you like to transfer to a human agent?
chat.transferredNotice: Transferred to a human agent, please wait for a response
chat.noAnswerFallback: Sorry, I cannot answer this question right now.
chat.networkError: Sorry, network issue. Please try again later.

seo.homepageDescription: Yousen Classroom has specialized in preschool-primary transition education for 8 years, offering full-time daycare, after-school care, and preschool-primary transition classes across six campuses in Wuhan.

advantages.titleFallback: 4 Core Advantages for Your Child's Best Start
